steps.title: Extract the radius from the diameter
steps.content: The diameter is 33 cm, so the radius is $r = \frac{33}{2} = 16.5$ cm.

steps.title: Calculate the volume using the sphere formula
steps.content:
First compute $r^3$:
$$(16.5)^3 = 4,492.125\text{ cm}^3$$
Substitute into the sphere volume formula with $\pi = 3.14159$:
$$V = \frac{4}{3} \times 3.14159 \times 4,492.125 \approx 18,816.55\text{ cm}^3$$

steps.title: Calculate mass and round to the nearest whole number
steps.content:
Mass equals density times volume:
$$\text{mass} = 2.3 \times 18,816.55 \approx 43,278.07\text{ grams}$$
Rounded to the nearest whole number: 43,278 grams.
